source_evidence.title: PP&D non-negotiable boundaries
source_evidence.quote_or_fact: Do not store credentials, session state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, payment details, private uploads, local private file paths, or raw authenticated page values in committed artifacts.

source_evidence.title: PP&D change monitoring
source_evidence.quote_or_fact: Change reports should identify changed source hashes, requirements, DevHub guidance, and affected guardrail bundle IDs.

source_evidence.title: PP&D core data products
source_evidence.quote_or_fact: Guardrail bundles, source freshness, and action journal records remain cited and validation oriented.

monitoring_checks.summary: Confirm committed freshness metadata still cites expected PP&D source evidence before consumer-facing draft preview handoff.
drift_signals: source hash changed without affected requirement mapping
freshness status missing for monitored official guidance
monitoring_checks.escalation_path: Open offline release review blocker and keep packet out of consumer migration.

monitoring_checks.summary: Confirm release handoff continues to block live DevHub, browser, LLM, crawler, processor, PDF, and mutation claims.
drift_signals: consumer packet enables active mutation flags
monitoring_checks.escalation_path: Reject packet and rerun offline readiness validation from committed fixtures only.

rollback_triggers.condition: Any monitoring check lacks citations, drift signals, escalation owner, or cited rollback trigger.
Any packet field claims live execution, private facts, raw artifacts, outcome guarantees, or active state mutation.
